description: nitap.ac.in is the website of the National Institute of Technology Arunachal Pradesh, an Indian higher-education institute. Its public web presence includes institute information and an administrative portal hosted at api.nitap.ac.in.
summary: nitap.ac.in exposes an apparent web-based admin/API host at https://api.nitap.ac.in/, but no public developer documentation, machine-readable API spec, GraphQL endpoint, MCP server, or CLI documentation could be verified.
